title: Saturized
description: Cleans up ugly out-of-place pixels by adjusting saturation and hues of blocks.
body:
![This is an image](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/822464029359865916/1128497132857479219/image.png)

[![Discord](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/822464029359865916/1128495855834497055/image.png)](https://discord.gg/wH3RgvR43E) 

![This is an image](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/822464029359865916/1128501625858834472/image.png)

This resource pack was meant to change "out-of-place" pixels found throughout textures. While **Saturized** brings your favorite blocks a quick touch-up, it also brings a variety of connected textures, emissive textures, and lightmaps.

You may not use any features from this resource pack without my permission.

![This is an image](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/822464029359865916/1128502281080426546/image.png)

#### This includes features such as Emissive Textures, Lightmaps, Connected Textures, Randomized Textures, etc.

![This is an image](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/822464029359865916/1128509043086999572/image.png)

![This is an image](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/822464029359865916/1128510052668547192/image.png)

![](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/822464029359865916/1128511651465920544/image.png)

**Saturized** is compatible with Optifine and Optifine alternatives as long as they are in the correct version.

Download Optifine [here](https://optifine.net/home).

A great list of Optifine alternatives made by **LambdAurora** can be found [here](https://lambdaurora.dev/optifine_alternatives/).

![This is an image](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/822464029359865916/1128503222168993903/image.png)

The lightmap is inspired by **SeaOfPixels**' resource pack, [New Default+](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/newdefaultplus). 

Big thanks to **BlueMeanial** for their resource pack testing world, [Restworld](https://claritypack.com/restworld/index.html). 

Randomized texture templates from [Vanilla Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/picker/resource-packs/).
